projects.recommendation: Proceed to Phase 3 — all Phase 2 exit criteria have been met.
projects.decision: PILOT APPROVED - Phase 3 milestones met. Pilot approved for two pilot regions (North and East). Full rollout contingent on pilot KPIs being met within 12 weeks. Budget of $250,000 released for pilot phase.

projects.recommendation: Formally close the project; all deliverables accepted by business stakeholders.
projects.decision: APPROVED - User Acceptance Testing completed with all critical defects resolved. Project approved to proceed to Go-Live Preparation. Final budget of EUR 60,000 confirmed.
action_items: Thomas Edgerton: Prepare change management plan - Due: 26 June 2025

projects.recommendation: Invest in automated data quality monitoring to prevent regression during scale-out.
